def positive_retry_policy_scattered_across_multiple_callers():
    rule_id = "retry_policy_scattered_across_multiple_callers"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag repeated retry or backoff loops around the same dependency instead of one owner boundary."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
